# Evidence Index — Eastland Energy Networks (Fixture A)

> ⚠️ **SYNTHETIC COMPOSITE — TEST FIXTURE.** Index of the illustrative discovery evidence assembled for the `au-energy` validation. See `../../REFERENCES_AND_METHODOLOGY.md`.

## Citation scope (Track A — clean slate)

The following constitute the citeable discovery inputs for an `au-energy` Track A run against Fixture A. Anything not listed here is out of citation scope.

| ID | Document | Type | Primary hooks |
|----|----------|------|---------------|
| EEN-SCB | `EEN_Strategic_Context_Brief.md` | Strategic context | All domains; org/network/programs/posture |
| EEN-PROP | `EEN_Engagement_Proposal.md` | Engagement scope | Scope of the four regulatory lenses |
| EEN-PDC | `EEN_Pre_Discovery_Checklist.md` | Evidence request | What evidence exists / is missing |
| EEN-PRIM | `EEN_Assessment_Engagement_Primer.md` | Framing | North star, working model |
| EEN-INT-01 | `interviews/01_CISO_interview_extracted.md` | Interview | AESCSF, SA/monitoring, IAM, EDM, SOCI cyber, E8 |
| EEN-INT-02 | `interviews/02_Network_Control_OT_interview_extracted.md` | Interview | OT estate, segmentation, control centre, vendor access, DER comms, anti-patterns |
| EEN-INT-03 | `interviews/03_Regulation_Compliance_interview_extracted.md` | Interview | SOCI/CIRMP, attestation, ring-fencing, privacy |
| EEN-AESCSF | `raw_data/AESCSF_prior_self_assessment_summary.md` | Prior assessment | MIL baseline by domain (stale) |
| EEN-OTAR | `raw_data/OT_asset_register_sample.md` | Asset register | OT inventory, patch status, anti-patterns |
| EEN-SOCI | `raw_data/SOCI_CIRMP_attestation_register.md` | Compliance register | CIRMP hazards, attestation history, reporting capability |
| EEN-RF | `raw_data/Ring_fencing_register_extract.md` | Compliance register | Activity classification, separation controls |
| EEN-OTPAI | `raw_data/OT_pseudo_asset_inventory.md` | Pseudo asset inventory (Track B) | AESCSF ACM/SA/TVM/CA/EDM; AI assurance; SOCI asset resilience & supply chain |
| EEN-ARCH | `raw_data/Architecture_Diagrams.md` | Architecture & data-flow diagrams (Track B) | AESCSF CA/SA/ACM/EDM; SOCI dependency mapping; ring-fencing data flows |
| EEN-KSVS | `raw_data/Key_Systems_Vendor_Stack.md` | Application/technology portfolio (Track B) | Real vendor stack incl. middleware (webMethods) + network segmentation & security systems; AESCSF EDM/CA/SA; SOCI supply chain |

## Process note (carried from the federal eval)

Per the federal eval's "Process Improvement Rule", before declaring citation scope complete the recipe should check for evidence items dated after this index and triage them. For Fixture A all evidence is co-dated; no later items exist.
